message:
test(config): add config discovery and precedence tests (ntm-be9r)

Add comprehensive tests for config file discovery and merging:
- TestFindProjectConfig: tests directory traversal to find .ntm/config.toml
- TestLoadMerged: tests global + project config loading and merging
- TestMergeConfig: tests merge logic including agent overrides, defaults,
  unsafe palette path rejection, and palette state precedence
- TestMergeStringListPreferFirst: tests the string list merge helper

These tests cover the config discovery precedence chain from project
directories up to global config, with proper merging semantics.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
